title: STAT+: Jeffrey Epstein’s tissue samples ignited a furor in the Harvard lab of George Church
description: Exclusive: Harvard geneticist George Church knew more about Jeffrey Epstein's activities than he has previously said, before accepting new donations from the sex offender.
